title: May-Ya-Moto
summary: May-Ya-Moto is a potentially active volcano in the east of the Democratic Republic of the Congo. It has a prominence of 950 metres (3,117 ft). Although no eruptions have been dated, the volcano still shows signs of unrest. At the crater, fumaroles and hot springs are active. Water temperatures are less than 100 C (212 F). There isn't much documentation or studies on this volcano.
